## beehiiv automations enroll

Enroll an existing subscriber into an automation

### Synopsis

Enroll an existing subscriber into an automation when that automation has an active Add by API trigger.

API path: /publications/{publicationId}/automations/{automationId}/journeys

```
beehiiv automations enroll <automationId> [flags]
```

### Examples

```
beehiiv automations enroll aut_123 --body '{"email":"person@example.com"}'
beehiiv automations enroll aut_123 --body '{"subscription_id":"sub_123"}'
```

### Options

```
      --body string         Provide a request body as inline JSON, @path, or - for stdin
  -h, --help                help for enroll
      --query stringArray   Add a repeatable query parameter in key=value form
```
